summary: Iteration 2 testing complete: Mobile OTP login feature fully tested and working. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All OTP flows, UI elements, and navigation tested and working (100%). New OTP auth endpoints verified, wrong OTP rejection working, all tabs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile OTP login implemented correctly with mock OTP returned in API response
OTP endpoints properly validate input (mobile number, OTP format)
Wrong OTP correctly returns 401 and prevents login
User creation on first OTP login working correctly
Session token generation and validation working
Frontend OTP flow UX is smooth with clear OTP hint display
All testID attributes present for OTP flow elements
Tab navigation working correctly across all 4 tabs
Profile page displays user info correctly (User XXXX format for OTP users)
Theme toggle, income setting, and logout all functional

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed - 7 new OTP tests + 10 existing tests)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all OTP flows, UI elements, and navigation working)

seed_data_creation: Created test OTP users during testing: TEST_9998887776, TEST_1234567890. These can be cleaned up by filtering TEST_ prefix in mobile field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2: Mobile OTP login added as primary auth method. OTP is mocked (returned in send-otp API response and shown in alert/hint on screen). All tests passed. Backend has 2 new endpoints: POST /api/auth/send-otp and POST /api/auth/verify-otp. Frontend login screen now shows mobile input with +91 prefix, Send OTP button, OTP verification screen with hint showing the mock OTP. After OTP verification, user is created (if new) and redirected to dashboard. All existing features (dashboard, transactions, chat, profile) continue to work. Google OAuth kept as secondary auth option (web only).
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All features working as expected.
